vocab.sentence: Ted went to the Halloween party in a Super Mario costume.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Ted 穿著超級瑪利歐的服裝去參加萬聖節派對。

vocab.sentence: The girl is known for her language ability.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個女孩以她的語言才能而聞名。

vocab.sentence: This scooter is amazing. It only has one weakness—it is too heavy for me.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這台機車很棒，它只有一個缺點——對我來說太重了。

vocab.sentence: Ann seldom talks about her personal life, so we know very little about her.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Ann 很少談論她的私人生活，所以我們對她了解得很少。

vocab.sentence: It is normal to feel sad when his pet dies.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 當他的寵物死去時感到難過是正常的。

vocab.sentence: After the pop star was murdered, all of his fans cried over his death.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那位流行歌手被謀殺後，他所有的粉絲都為他的死亡而哭泣。

vocab.sentence: Gina just broke up with her boyfriend, and she was very depressed about it.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Gina 剛剛和她的男友分手，她對此感到非常沮喪。

vocab.sentence: Today, computer crime is a big problem.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如今，電腦犯罪是一個大問題。

vocab.sentence: Ben sent a long message to Jane in anger because she forgot about their date.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Ben 因為 Jane 忘記了他們的約會而憤怒地發了一封長訊息給她。

vocab.sentence: My brother wore a mask to protect himself from the dirty air.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我的哥哥戴著口罩來保護自己免受髒空氣侵害。

vocab.sentence: Celine changed to a different phone case to provide better protection for her smartphone.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Celine 換了一個不同的手機殼，為她的智慧型手機提供更好的保護。

vocab.sentence: I had a lovely blanket in my childhood, but it is gone now.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我童年時有一條可愛的毯子，但現在它已不見了。

vocab.sentence: There are fewer female taxi drivers than male ones.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 女性計程車司機比男性少。

vocab.sentence: Many people respect Jam Hsiao for his acts of kindness.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 許多人因蕭敬騰的善舉而尊敬他。

vocab.sentence: Mike is not good at hiding his emotions.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Mike 不擅長隱藏他的情緒。

vocab.sentence: Going to bed late has a negative effect on the human body.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 晚睡對人體有負面影響。

phrases.sentence: Believe it or not, cats cannot taste sweet things.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 信不信由你，貓無法嚐到甜味。

phrases.sentence: Although Maggie was sad about her breakup, she soon got over it.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 雖然 Maggie 對她的分手感到難過，但她很快就從中恢復了。

phrases.sentence: The producer made the baker's story into a TV drama.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那位製作人把麵包師傅的故事改編成電視劇。

phrases.sentence: Joanne doesn't know how to deal with the noise that her neighbors make.
phrases.sentence_chinese: Joanne 不知道如何應付她鄰居發出的噪音。

tips.label: 關係子句 — 受格用法
such...that... 句型
tips.text: S + V + such (+ a/an) + Adj + N + that 子句

notes.title: 關係子句 — 受格用法
notes.description: 當關係代名詞在子句中擔任受格時，常可省略。人用 whom；物/動物用 which；人/物/動物皆可用 that。
examples: The song that Nick is singing was written by himself.

notes.title: such...that... 句型
notes.rule: S + V + such (+ a/an) + Adj + N + that 子句
notes.description: 意為「如此...以至於...」。such 後面接「形容詞 + 名詞」，that 子句表示結果。
examples: It is such a personal question that I don't want to answer it.

quiz.question: The costume ________ the actor wore was very expensive.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (costume)，關代作為 wore 的受格。

quiz.question: It is ________ a normal day that I just want to stay at home.
quiz.hint: normal day 為名詞片語，符合 such a + Adj + N + that 結構。

quiz.question: The ability ________ the girl showed surprised everyone.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (ability)，關代作為 showed 的受格。

quiz.question: He has ________ a negative emotion that he cannot sleep at night.
quiz.hint: negative emotion 為名詞片語，應選 such。

quiz.question: The female teacher ________ all the students respect is Miss Lin.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為人，關代作為 respect 的受格。

quiz.question: Believe it or not, the crime ________ the man committed was for his family.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (crime)，關代作為 committed 的受格。

quiz.question: It was ________ a terrible murder that no one dared to talk about it.
quiz.hint: murder 為名詞，使用 such...that 句型。

quiz.question: The personal problems ________ Mike is dealing with are very complex.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物，關代作為 dealing with 的受格。

quiz.question: Gina felt ________ depressed that she didn't want to eat anything.
quiz.hint: depressed 為形容詞，前面接 so。

quiz.question: The protection ________ the mask provides is very important.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (protection)，關代作為 provides 的受格。

quiz.question: This is ________ a weakness that he needs to get over it quickly.
quiz.hint: weakness 為名詞，使用 such...that 句型。

quiz.question: The emotions ________ the movie made into a story were very touching.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (emotions)，關代作為 made 的受格。

quiz.question: The childhood memory ________ Ted treasures is about his grandfather.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (memory)，關代作為 treasures 的受格。

quiz.question: It was ________ anger that Ben couldn't say a word.
quiz.hint: anger 為不可數名詞，後面接 that，故選 such。

quiz.question: The female doctor ________ we saw yesterday is very famous.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為人 (doctor)，關代作為 saw 的受格。

quiz.question: The negative effect ________ smoking has on health is well-known.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (negative effect)，關代作為 has 的受格。

quiz.question: Ann is ________ an emotional person that she cries easily.
quiz.hint: emotional person 為名詞片語，選 such。

quiz.question: The personal life ________ the star wants to protect is not for the public.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (personal life)，關代作為 protect 的受格。

quiz.question: It is ________ a simple ability that anyone can learn it.
quiz.hint: ability 為名詞，使用 such...that 句型。

quiz.question: The murder ________ the police are investigating happened last night.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (murder)，關代作為 investigating 的受格。

quiz.question: Ted was in ________ anger that he broke the chair.
quiz.hint: anger 為不可數名詞，此處為「such + N + that」結構。

quiz.question: The costume ________ I bought for the party is too small.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (costume)，關代作為 bought 的受格。

quiz.question: It is ________ a normal reaction that you don't need to worry.
quiz.hint: normal reaction 為名詞片語，選 such。

quiz.question: The weakness ________ the team has is their slow speed.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (weakness)，關代作為 has 的受格。

quiz.question: The female student ________ I respect most is very hardworking.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為人 (student)，關代作為 respect 的受格。

quiz.question: The ability ________ Ted has in languages is very impressive.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (ability)，關代作為 has 的受格。

quiz.question: It is ________ a normal day that I just want to stay at home.
quiz.hint: normal day 為名詞片語，使用 such...that 句型。

quiz.question: The crime ________ the man committed was very serious.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (crime)，關代作為 committed 的受格。

quiz.question: He is ________ an emotional person that he cried during the movie.
quiz.hint: emotional person 為名詞片語，前面接 such。

quiz.question: The protection ________ the helmet provides is for your safety.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (protection)，關代作為 provides 的受格。

quiz.question: Believe it or not, it is ________ a hard problem that I can't deal with it.
quiz.hint: hard problem 為名詞片語，符合 such...that 結構。

quiz.question: The female writer ________ everyone respects is very humble.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為人 (writer)，關代作為 respects 的受格。

quiz.question: The negative effect ________ the news had on her was huge.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (negative effect)，關代作為 had 的受格。

quiz.question: It was ________ a personal matter that I didn't want to tell anyone.
quiz.hint: personal matter 為名詞片語，選 such。

quiz.question: The emotions ________ the boy expressed in his poem were deep.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (emotions)，關代作為 expressed 的受格。

quiz.question: Gina is dealing with ________ a depressed mood that she needs a break.
quiz.hint: depressed mood 為名詞片語，故選 such。

quiz.question: The weakness ________ the scooter has is its weight.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (weakness)，關代作為 has 的受格。

quiz.question: The female doctor ________ we met last week is very kind.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為人，關代作為 met 的受格。

quiz.question: It is ________ a normal feeling that you shouldn't be ashamed.
quiz.hint: normal feeling 為名詞片語，選 such。

quiz.question: The childhood friend ________ I haven't seen for years called me today.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為人 (friend)，關代作為 seen 的受格。

quiz.question: The anger ________ Ben showed yesterday was scary.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為不可數名詞 (anger)，關代作為 showed 的受格。

quiz.question: It was ________ a loud noise that everyone looked at the door.
quiz.hint: loud noise 為名詞片語，選 such。

quiz.question: The murder ________ the movie is based on was a real story.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (murder)，關代作為 based on 的受格。

quiz.question: He has ________ a great ability that he can speak five languages.
quiz.hint: ability 為名詞，使用 such...that 句型。

quiz.question: The personal information ________ the app collected was stolen.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (information)，關代作為 collected 的受格。

quiz.question: She is ________ a famous female singer that everyone knows her.
quiz.hint: female singer 為名詞片語，選 such。

quiz.question: The costume ________ my mother made for me was beautiful.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (costume)，選 which。

quiz.question: It is ________ a negative thing that we should not talk about it.
quiz.hint: negative thing 為名詞片語，選 such。

quiz.question: The emotions ________ Mike feels are difficult to get over.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (emotions)，關代作為 feels 的受格。

quiz.question: Believe it or not, he has ________ a good heart that he helps everyone.
quiz.hint: good heart 為名詞片語，符合 such...that。

vocab.sentence: Ted went to the Halloween party in a Super Mario costume.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Ted 穿著超級瑪利歐的服裝去參加萬聖節派對。

vocab.sentence: The girl is known for her language ability.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個女孩以她的語言才能而聞名。

vocab.sentence: This scooter is amazing. It only has one weakness—it is too heavy for me.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這台機車很棒，它只有一個缺點——對我來說太重了。

vocab.sentence: Ann seldom talks about her personal life, so we know very little about her.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Ann 很少談論她的私人生活，所以我們對她了解得很少。

vocab.sentence: It is normal to feel sad when his pet dies.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 當他的寵物死去時感到難過是正常的。

vocab.sentence: After the pop star was murdered, all of his fans cried over his death.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那位流行歌手被謀殺後，他所有的粉絲都為他的死亡而哭泣。

vocab.sentence: Gina just broke up with her boyfriend, and she was very depressed about it.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Gina 剛剛和她的男友分手，她對此感到非常沮喪。

vocab.sentence: Diane always stays positive. Almost nothing can depress her.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Diane 總是保持正面。幾乎沒有任何事情能讓她沮喪。

vocab.sentence: Today, computer crime is a big problem.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如今，電腦犯罪是一個大問題。

vocab.sentence: Ben sent a long message to Jane in anger because she forgot about their date.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Ben 因為 Jane 忘記了他們的約會而憤怒地發了一封長訊息給她。

vocab.sentence: My brother wore a mask to protect himself from the dirty air.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我的哥哥戴著口罩來保護自己免受髒空氣侵害。

vocab.sentence: Celine changed to a different phone case to provide better protection for her smartphone.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Celine 換了一個不同的手機殼，為她的智慧型手機提供更好的保護。

vocab.sentence: I had a lovely blanket in my childhood, but it is gone now.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我童年時有一條可愛的毯子，但現在它已不見了。

vocab.sentence: There are fewer female taxi drivers than male ones.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 女性計程車司機比男性少。

vocab.sentence: This toilet is only for females. Men are not allowed to use it.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個廁所僅供女性使用，男性不得使用。

vocab.sentence: Many people respect Jam Hsiao for his acts of kindness.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 許多人因蕭敬騰的善舉而尊敬他。

vocab.sentence: The team leader worked hard and earned the respect of the whole team.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那位隊長努力工作，贏得了整個團隊的尊重。

vocab.sentence: Mike is not good at hiding his emotions.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Mike 不擅長隱藏他的情緒。

vocab.sentence: If we can meet our emotional needs, we can lead a happier life.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如果我們能滿足情感上的需求，我們就能過上更幸福的生活。

vocab.sentence: Going to bed late has a negative effect on the human body.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 晚睡對人體有負面影響。

phrases.sentence: Believe it or not, cats cannot taste sweet things.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 信不信由你，貓無法嚐到甜味。

phrases.sentence: Although Maggie was sad about her breakup, she soon got over it.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 雖然 Maggie 對她的分手感到難過，但她很快就從中恢復了。

phrases.sentence: The producer made the baker's story into a TV drama.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那位製作人把麵包師傅的故事改編成電視劇。

phrases.sentence: Joanne doesn't know how to deal with the noise that her neighbors make.
phrases.sentence_chinese: Joanne 不知道如何應付她鄰居發出的噪音。

grammar.sentence: The costume which Ted wore was very cool.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Ted 穿的那套服裝非常酷。

grammar.sentence: It is such a personal question that I cannot answer.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這是如此私人的問題以至於我無法回答。

grammar.sentence: The ability that the girl has is very special.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那位女孩擁有的才能非常特別。

grammar.sentence: It was such a deep weakness that he felt sad.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此深處的弱點以至於他感到難過。

grammar.sentence: The female leader whom the people respect is very kind.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 人們尊敬的那位女性領導者非常仁慈。

grammar.sentence: Believe it or not, the crime that he committed was a mistake.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 信不信由你，他所犯下的罪行是一個錯誤。

grammar.sentence: It was such a terrible murder that everyone was afraid.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此可怕的謀殺案以至於每個人都害怕。

grammar.sentence: The personal life that the star has is very busy.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那位明星擁有的私人生活非常忙碌。

grammar.sentence: It is such a normal day that nothing special happened.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這是如此平凡的一天以至於沒有什麼特別的事發生。

grammar.sentence: The anger that Ben felt was very strong.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Ben 感受到的憤怒非常強烈。

grammar.sentence: It was such a great protection that the phone survived.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此棒的保護以至於手機倖存了下來。

grammar.sentence: The childhood memories which I treasure are about my dog.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我珍藏的那段童年回憶是關於我的狗。

grammar.sentence: It was such an emotional movie that many people cried.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此感人的電影以至於許多人都哭了。

grammar.sentence: The negative emotions that Mike is dealing with are hard.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Mike 正在處理的那些負面情緒很艱難。

grammar.sentence: The female student whom the teacher praised is very smart.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 老師讚美的那位女學生非常聰明。

grammar.sentence: The normal life that I live is simple and happy.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我過的一般生活簡單且快樂。

grammar.sentence: It is such a heavy scooter that I cannot move it.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 它是如此重的一台機車以至於我搬不動它。

grammar.sentence: The anger which Ted showed made everyone scared.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Ted 表現出的憤怒讓每個人都感到害怕。

grammar.sentence: It was such a difficult crime that the police couldn't solve it.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是一樁如此困難的罪行以至於警察無法解決它。

grammar.sentence: The female doctor whom we visited is very professional.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我們拜訪的那位女醫生非常專業。

grammar.sentence: It is such a negative effect that we must avoid it.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這是如此負面的影響以至於我們必須避免它。

grammar.sentence: The personal reasons that she gave were not true.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 她給出的那些個人理由並非真實。

grammar.sentence: It was such a lovely childhood that I will never forget it.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此美好的童年以至於我永遠不會忘記。

grammar.sentence: The emotions that Mike is hiding are very deep.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Mike 正在隱藏的情緒非常深。

grammar.sentence: It was such a funny costume that everyone laughed.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此滑稽的服裝以至於每個人都笑了。

grammar.sentence: The ability which you have will help you in the future.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你擁有的才能在未來會對你有幫助。

grammar.sentence: It is such a serious murder that it is on the news.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此嚴重的謀殺案以至於上了新聞。

grammar.sentence: The female students whom I teach are very smart.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我教的那些女學生非常聰明。

grammar.sentence: It was such a bad weakness that the team lost.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此糟糕的弱點以至於隊伍輸了。

grammar.sentence: The protection which this case provides is very good.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這個殼提供的保護非常好。

vocab.sentence: Museums preserve important artifacts for future students.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 博物館保存重要文物，讓未來的學生能學習。

vocab.sentence: This institution trains young artists to repair old paintings.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個機構訓練年輕藝術家修復古畫。

vocab.sentence: The bronze artifact was found inside an ancient tomb.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這件青銅文物是在一座古墓裡被發現的。

vocab.sentence: The city plans to convert the old station into a museum.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 市政府計畫把舊車站改造成博物館。

vocab.sentence: The guide told us an extraordinary story about the temple.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 導遊告訴我們一個關於這座寺廟的非凡故事。

vocab.sentence: Approximately two thousand people visit the site every day.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 每天大約有兩千人參觀這個地點。

vocab.sentence: Better infrastructure can make travel to the island easier.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 更好的基礎建設能讓前往這座島的旅程更方便。

vocab.sentence: The wall will deteriorate quickly if no one repairs it.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如果沒有人修理，這面牆會很快惡化。

vocab.sentence: The old castle has become a popular destination for families.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這座古堡已成為家庭旅遊的熱門目的地。

vocab.sentence: The museum uses specialized tools to clean fragile objects.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 博物館使用專門工具清潔脆弱物件。

vocab.sentence: The researcher studied the ancient map intensely for hours.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 研究員專注地研究那張古地圖好幾個小時。

vocab.sentence: There are several notable temples in this historic district.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個歷史街區有幾座著名寺廟。

vocab.sentence: Many people donate money to help preserve local heritage.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 許多人捐錢幫助保存地方文化遺產。

vocab.sentence: The bronze statue stands near the entrance of the museum.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那座青銅雕像立在博物館入口附近。

vocab.sentence: The gallery shows both ancient artifacts and contemporary art.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這間畫廊展示古文物與當代藝術。

vocab.sentence: The new hall gives visitors ample space to walk around.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 新大廳給參觀者充足的走動空間。

vocab.sentence: The broken vase is evidence of life in the ancient village.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個破碎花瓶是古村落生活的證據。

vocab.sentence: The king was buried in a tomb under the hill.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那位國王被埋葬在山丘下的墳墓裡。

vocab.sentence: Young people should learn to cherish their cultural heritage.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 年輕人應該學會珍惜自己的文化遺產。

vocab.sentence: The building is not merely old; it is part of our history.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這棟建築不僅僅是老舊，它也是我們歷史的一部分。

vocab.sentence: Grandma taught us to cherish every family photo.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 奶奶教我們珍惜每一張家庭照片。

vocab.sentence: Visitors can see physical evidence of the city's past.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 參觀者可以看見這座城市過去的實體證據。

vocab.sentence: A professional repaired the damaged bronze bowl.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 一位專業人士修復了受損的青銅碗。

vocab.sentence: There is a restriction on touching the artifacts.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 館內有禁止觸摸文物的限制。

vocab.sentence: The guide gave us verbal instructions before we entered the tomb.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 導遊在我們進入古墓前給了口頭指示。

vocab.sentence: Taking photos may violate the rules in this museum.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 拍照可能違反這間博物館的規定。

vocab.sentence: The online content explains why the old wall must be protected.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 線上內容說明為什麼這面古牆必須被保護。

vocab.sentence: If people neglect the temple, it will soon deteriorate.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如果人們忽視這座寺廟，它很快就會惡化。

vocab.sentence: A guided tour can be beneficial to first-time visitors.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 導覽對第一次來的參觀者很有益。

phrases.sentence: This museum holds the crown for attracting the most students in the city.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 這間博物館在吸引最多本市學生方面居首位。

phrases.sentence: The extraordinary bronze mask drew in a large crowd.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那個非凡的青銅面具吸引了一大群人。

phrases.sentence: Too many visitors can put a strain on local infrastructure.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 太多遊客可能對地方基礎建設造成壓力。

phrases.chinese: 脫穎而出；格外引人注目
phrases.sentence: The contemporary design helps the new museum stand out.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 當代設計讓這座新博物館格外引人注目。

phrases.sentence: The old town claimed the title of the most popular heritage destination.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 這座老城獲得最受歡迎文化遺產目的地的頭銜。

phrases.sentence: Parents pass local stories on to their children.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 父母把地方故事傳給孩子。

phrases.sentence: Wind and rain slowly wear down the stone steps.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 風雨慢慢磨損石階。

phrases.sentence: The team put off the repair work because of heavy rain.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 團隊因大雨延後修復工作。

phrases.sentence: The website helps visitors filter out tours that are too expensive.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 這個網站幫助參觀者篩掉太貴的行程。

tips.label: Language Spotlight
tips.text: 用 hold the crown for、claim the title of 表示「在某方面居首位／獲得頭銜」。

tips.label: 吸引與篩選
tips.text: draw in 表示「吸引」，filter out 表示「過濾；篩選」。

tips.label: 壓力、磨損與延後
tips.text: put/place a strain on、wear down、put off 常用來描述文化遺產維護遇到的問題。

notes.title: Language Spotlight: ranking and titles
notes.rule: hold the crown for + N/V-ing; claim the title of + N
notes.description: 這兩個片語都跟「第一名、頭銜、最有代表性」有關。for 後面可接名詞或 V-ing；of 後面接名詞片語。
examples: This museum holds the crown for preserving bronze artifacts.
The city claimed the title of the best heritage destination.

notes.title: Language Spotlight: attraction and selection
notes.rule: draw in + N; filter out + N
notes.description: draw in 強調吸引人、注意力或興趣；filter out 強調把不需要或不合適的東西篩掉。
examples: The exhibition drew in many students.
The website filters out tours that violate safety rules.

notes.title: Language Spotlight: pressure and delay
notes.rule: put/place a strain on + N; put off + N/V-ing; wear down + N
notes.description: 這組片語常用來說明保存文物或文化遺產時的困難，例如壓力、磨損與延期。
examples: Tourism can put a strain on local infrastructure.
Rain slowly wears down the stone steps.
The team put off repairing the tomb.

notes.title: Language Spotlight: transfer and visibility
notes.rule: pass sth on to sb; stand out
notes.description: pass sth on to sb 表示把知識、故事或物品傳給某人；stand out 表示特別明顯或突出。
examples: Parents pass cultural heritage on to their children.
The bronze mask stands out in the exhibit.

quiz.question: The museum works hard to _______ old photographs and letters.
quiz.hint: preserve 表示「保存；保護」。

quiz.question: A university is an important educational _______.
quiz.hint: institution 可指「機構」。

quiz.question: The ancient bowl is a valuable _______ from the old kingdom.
quiz.hint: artifact 是「文物；古器物」。

quiz.question: Workers will _______ the empty factory into a cultural center.
quiz.hint: convert A into B 表示「把 A 轉變成 B」。

quiz.question: The dancer gave an _______ performance that everyone remembered.
quiz.hint: extraordinary 表示「非凡的；傑出的」。

quiz.question: The trip takes _______ three hours by bus.
quiz.hint: approximately 表示「大約」。

quiz.question: Good roads and bridges are part of a city's _______.
quiz.hint: infrastructure 是「基礎建設」。

quiz.question: Without care, the wooden house began to _______.
quiz.hint: deteriorate 表示「惡化」。

quiz.question: Kyoto is a famous travel _______ in Japan.
quiz.hint: destination 是「目的地」。

quiz.question: The repair team needs _______ knowledge to handle old paintings.
quiz.hint: specialized 表示「專門的」。

quiz.question: She listened _______ to every word of the lecture.
quiz.hint: intensely 可表示「專注地」。

quiz.question: The city is known for its _______ night market and temples.
quiz.hint: notable 表示「著名的；顯著的」。

quiz.question: Local businesses will _______ money to restore the old theater.
quiz.hint: donate 表示「捐贈」。

quiz.question: The museum displays a _______ sword from ancient times.
quiz.hint: bronze 表示「青銅的」。

quiz.question: The artist mixes traditional ideas with _______ design.
quiz.hint: contemporary 表示「當代的；現代的」。

quiz.question: There is _______ time for us to visit every room.
quiz.hint: ample 表示「充足的」。

quiz.question: Scientists found strong _______ that people lived there long ago.
quiz.hint: evidence 表示「證據」。

quiz.question: The queen's _______ was discovered under the desert sand.
quiz.hint: tomb 是「墳墓」。

quiz.question: The festival is part of our cultural _______.
quiz.hint: heritage 是「文化遺產」。

quiz.question: The statue is not _______ a decoration; it tells a story.
quiz.hint: merely 表示「僅僅；只是」。

quiz.question: We should _______ the memories of our grandparents.
quiz.hint: cherish 表示「珍惜」。

quiz.question: The museum keeps both digital records and _______ objects.
quiz.hint: physical 可表示「實體的」。

quiz.question: You should ask a _______ before cleaning old coins.
quiz.hint: professional 可當名詞「專業人士」。

quiz.question: There is a strict _______ on food and drinks in the gallery.
quiz.hint: restriction 是「限制」。

quiz.question: A _______ warning is not enough; please write it down.
quiz.hint: verbal 表示「口頭的」。

quiz.question: Do not _______ the rules by touching the paintings.
quiz.hint: violate 表示「違反」。

quiz.question: The video _______ explains the history of the ancient road.
quiz.hint: content 是「內容」。

quiz.question: Years of _______ caused the old house to fall apart.
quiz.hint: neglect 作名詞可指「忽視」。

quiz.question: Daily practice is _______ to language learning.
quiz.hint: beneficial 表示「有益的」。

quiz.question: The museum _______ the crown for having the oldest bronze bell.
quiz.hint: hold the crown for 表示「在……方面居首位」。

quiz.question: Bright posters helped _______ more students to the exhibition.
quiz.hint: draw in 表示「吸引」。

quiz.question: Heavy tourism can put a _______ on small communities.
quiz.hint: put a strain on 表示「對……造成壓力」。

quiz.question: Among all the artifacts, the bronze mask really _______.
quiz.hint: stand out 表示「格外引人注目」。

quiz.question: The city hopes to claim the _______ of Asia's top heritage site.
quiz.hint: claim the title of 表示「獲得……頭銜」。

quiz.question: Teachers can pass useful study habits _______ to their students.
quiz.hint: pass sth on to sb 表示「把某物傳給某人」。

quiz.question: Tourists' footsteps slowly _______ the old wooden floor.
quiz.hint: wear down 表示「磨損」。

quiz.question: The concert was _______ until next Friday because of the storm.
quiz.hint: put off 表示「延後」。

quiz.question: Use this tool to _______ unsafe online content.
quiz.hint: filter out 表示「過濾；篩選」。

quiz.question: The ancient wall has _______ since people stopped repairing it.
quiz.hint: 現在完成式可表示從過去到現在的變化。

quiz.question: The institution has _______ old maps for over fifty years.
quiz.hint: has preserved 是現在完成式。

quiz.question: This is the most _______ artifact in the entire museum.
quiz.hint: most + 形容詞可形成最高級。

quiz.question: That gallery is _______ larger than the room we visited yesterday.
quiz.hint: 比較級前可用 much 加強語氣。

quiz.question: The more people donate, the _______ we can preserve the site.
quiz.hint: the more..., the better... 表示「越……越好」。

quiz.question: Visitors are asked _______ touching the bronze statues.
quiz.hint: ask sb to V 的被動形式是 be asked to V。

quiz.question: The tomb, _______ was discovered in 1920, is now protected.
quiz.hint: which 可引導非限定關係子句補充物。

quiz.question: The guide explained why the artifact _______ be moved.
quiz.hint: must not 表示「禁止」。

quiz.question: _______ the restriction may damage the heritage site.
quiz.hint: 動名詞可當主詞。

quiz.question: We put off _______ the old bridge until a professional arrived.
quiz.hint: put off 後面接 V-ing。

quiz.question: The content was designed _______ first-time visitors understand the exhibit.
quiz.hint: to V 可表示目的。

quiz.question: The destination is famous _______ its contemporary art museum.
quiz.hint: be famous for 表示「以……聞名」。

vocab.sentence: Museums preserve important artifacts for future students.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 博物館保存重要文物，讓未來的學生能學習。

vocab.sentence: This institution trains young artists to repair old paintings.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個機構訓練年輕藝術家修復古畫。

vocab.sentence: The bronze artifact was found inside an ancient tomb.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這件青銅文物是在一座古墓裡被發現的。

vocab.sentence: The city plans to convert the old station into a museum.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 市政府計畫把舊車站改造成博物館。

vocab.sentence: The guide told us an extraordinary story about the temple.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 導遊告訴我們一個關於這座寺廟的非凡故事。

vocab.sentence: Approximately two thousand people visit the site every day.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 每天大約有兩千人參觀這個地點。

vocab.sentence: Better infrastructure can make travel to the island easier.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 更好的基礎建設能讓前往這座島的旅程更方便。

vocab.sentence: The wall will deteriorate quickly if no one repairs it.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如果沒有人修理，這面牆會很快惡化。

vocab.sentence: The old castle has become a popular destination for families.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這座古堡已成為家庭旅遊的熱門目的地。

vocab.sentence: The museum uses specialized tools to clean fragile objects.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 博物館使用專門工具清潔脆弱物件。

vocab.sentence: The researcher studied the ancient map intensely for hours.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 研究員專注地研究那張古地圖好幾個小時。

vocab.sentence: There are several notable temples in this historic district.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個歷史街區有幾座著名寺廟。

vocab.sentence: Many people donate money to help preserve local heritage.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 許多人捐錢幫助保存地方文化遺產。

vocab.sentence: The bronze statue stands near the entrance of the museum.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那座青銅雕像立在博物館入口附近。

vocab.sentence: The gallery shows both ancient artifacts and contemporary art.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這間畫廊展示古文物與當代藝術。

vocab.sentence: The new hall gives visitors ample space to walk around.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 新大廳給參觀者充足的走動空間。

vocab.sentence: The broken vase is evidence of life in the ancient village.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個破碎花瓶是古村落生活的證據。

vocab.sentence: The king was buried in a tomb under the hill.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那位國王被埋葬在山丘下的墳墓裡。

vocab.sentence: Young people should learn to cherish their cultural heritage.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 年輕人應該學會珍惜自己的文化遺產。

vocab.sentence: The building is not merely old; it is part of our history.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這棟建築不僅僅是老舊，它也是我們歷史的一部分。

vocab.sentence: Grandma taught us to cherish every family photo.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 奶奶教我們珍惜每一張家庭照片。

vocab.sentence: Visitors can see physical evidence of the city's past.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 參觀者可以看見這座城市過去的實體證據。

vocab.sentence: A professional repaired the damaged bronze bowl.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 一位專業人士修復了受損的青銅碗。

vocab.sentence: There is a restriction on touching the artifacts.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 館內有禁止觸摸文物的限制。

vocab.sentence: The guide gave us verbal instructions before we entered the tomb.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 導遊在我們進入古墓前給了口頭指示。

vocab.sentence: Taking photos may violate the rules in this museum.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 拍照可能違反這間博物館的規定。

vocab.sentence: The online content explains why the old wall must be protected.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 線上內容說明為什麼這面古牆必須被保護。

vocab.sentence: If people neglect the temple, it will soon deteriorate.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如果人們忽視這座寺廟，它很快就會惡化。

vocab.sentence: A guided tour can be beneficial to first-time visitors.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 導覽對第一次來的參觀者很有益。

phrases.sentence: This museum holds the crown for attracting the most students in the city.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 這間博物館在吸引最多本市學生方面居首位。

phrases.sentence: The extraordinary bronze mask drew in a large crowd.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那個非凡的青銅面具吸引了一大群人。

phrases.sentence: Too many visitors can put a strain on local infrastructure.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 太多遊客可能對地方基礎建設造成壓力。

phrases.sentence: The contemporary design helps the new museum stand out.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 當代設計讓這座新博物館格外引人注目。

phrases.sentence: The old town claimed the title of the most popular heritage destination.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 這座老城獲得最受歡迎文化遺產目的地的頭銜。

phrases.sentence: Parents pass local stories on to their children.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 父母把地方故事傳給孩子。

phrases.sentence: Wind and rain slowly wear down the stone steps.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 風雨慢慢磨損石階。

phrases.sentence: The team put off the repair work because of heavy rain.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 團隊因大雨延後修復工作。

phrases.sentence: The website helps visitors filter out tours that are too expensive.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 這個網站幫助參觀者篩掉太貴的行程。

grammar.sentence: This museum holds the crown for preserving ancient artifacts.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這間博物館在保存古文物方面居首位。

grammar.sentence: The bronze statue drew in thousands of visitors last month.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那座青銅雕像上個月吸引了數千名遊客。

grammar.sentence: Too many tourists can put a strain on local infrastructure.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 太多遊客可能對地方基礎建設造成壓力。

grammar.sentence: The contemporary building stands out among the old houses.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那棟現代建築在老房子之中特別引人注目。

grammar.sentence: The city claimed the title of the best heritage destination.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這座城市獲得最佳文化遺產目的地的頭銜。

grammar.sentence: Grandparents pass family stories on to their grandchildren.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 祖父母把家族故事傳給孫子女。

grammar.sentence: Heavy rain can wear down the stone walls over time.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 大雨久而久之會磨損石牆。

grammar.sentence: The school put off the field trip because of bad weather.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 學校因天氣不好延後校外教學。

grammar.sentence: The app can filter out content that violates the rules.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這個 app 可以過濾掉違反規則的內容。

grammar.sentence: The old temple has deteriorated because of years of neglect.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這座古廟因多年忽視而惡化。

grammar.sentence: A professional has converted the station into a small museum.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 一位專業人士已把車站改造成小型博物館。

grammar.sentence: The institution has donated ample money to preserve the tomb.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這個機構已捐贈充足資金保存古墓。

grammar.sentence: Visitors must follow the restrictions to protect the artifacts.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 參觀者必須遵守限制以保護文物。

grammar.sentence: Physical evidence shows that people lived here long ago.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 實體證據顯示很久以前有人住在這裡。

grammar.sentence: The guide spoke intensely about the value of cultural heritage.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 導遊專注地談論文化遺產的價值。

grammar.sentence: This is the most extraordinary artifact in the collection.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這是館藏中最非凡的文物。

grammar.sentence: The website provides beneficial content for first-time visitors.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這個網站提供對初次參觀者有益的內容。

grammar.sentence: The restriction was created to prevent people from touching the paintings.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這項限制是為了防止人們觸摸畫作。

grammar.sentence: We should cherish old buildings instead of merely replacing them.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我們應該珍惜老建築，而不是僅僅取代它們。

grammar.sentence: Approximately fifty volunteers helped repair the old wall.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 大約五十位志工幫忙修復古牆。

grammar.sentence: The museum uses specialized tools when it cleans bronze objects.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 博物館清潔青銅物件時使用專門工具。

grammar.sentence: The online tour draws in students who cannot visit in person.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 線上導覽吸引無法親自參觀的學生。

grammar.sentence: Repair costs put a strain on the small institution.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 修復費用對這個小機構造成壓力。

grammar.sentence: The old map stands out because of its unusual colors.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這張古地圖因不尋常的顏色而特別顯眼。

grammar.sentence: The town hopes to claim the title of a top cultural destination.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這座城鎮希望獲得頂尖文化目的地的頭銜。

grammar.sentence: Parents pass respect for heritage on to the next generation.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 父母把對文化遺產的尊重傳給下一代。

grammar.sentence: Sunlight may wear down the colors of old paintings.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 陽光可能會削弱古畫的色彩。

grammar.sentence: They put off opening the tomb until experts arrived.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他們延後開啟古墓，直到專家抵達。

grammar.sentence: The search engine filters out pages with harmful content.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 搜尋引擎會過濾掉含有有害內容的頁面。

grammar.sentence: Neglecting heritage sites can violate our duty to the past.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 忽視文化遺產地可能違反我們對過去的責任。
